justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's requested time and then proposed a very close alternative when the exact time was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully proposed a close alternative time slot when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking in two turns, accurately interpreting the user's intent and making a suitable alternative offer.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and offering a viable solution.
